changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Victim of the Fifth Year"

TextENGNew: "...So this is this year's curse, then?"
"...I suppose it would be, wouldn't it. ...Every year we're treated to a different method, but this one stands out even among them."
changeReason: Old translation attributes killings to a specific male perpetrator ('He kills them'), while new uses impersonal phrasing ('we're treated to a different method'), matching the Japanese which does not specify a subject.

TextENGNew: "Tearing out your own throat... that's just not normal..."
"Let's leave the rest to the old man in forensics. He'll turn up some suspicious substance, I'm sure of it."
"Good work, everyone! Good work out there!!"
"Oh, Ooishi-san! Komiyama-san and his team are here!"
"Ooishi-san, good work! I heard this year's one is a real prize."
"Indeed. They got the better of us. ...I was absolutely convinced it would be Teppei Houjou dying tonight..."
"Jirou Tomitake. An amateur photographer who comes to Hinamizawa a few times a year. ...We had no eyes on him at all..."
"...What do you think? Did they figure out we had eyes on the Houjou house and switch targets?"
"...Maybe so. ...We really walked right into that one..."

"Yes. His daughter left for the festival early in the evening, and a little while after that he rode off on his bike. ...His daughter came home first... actually, wait. He still hasn't come back? Is he out getting drunk somewhere...?"
"Ooishi-san, are you there?! Call from Division Chief Takasugi on the radio in Car 1!!"
changeReason: New translation specifies 'Division Chief' (課長) rather than just 'Chief', and correctly renders 無線 as 'radio' rather than implying a phone line.
